entries.title: Quiet server browser
changes: Disabled server browser debug logging in the console.

entries.title: Smaller Panorama logo
changes: Reduced the custom CS:GO navbar logo size again.

entries.title: Panorama logo alignment
changes: Centered the custom CS:GO logo inside the navbar button slot.

entries.title: Panorama logo sizing
changes: Reduced the custom CS:GO logo size in the Panorama navbar.

entries.title: Panorama logo states
changes: CS:GO Logo now uses Pasthetic hosted logo assets from GitHub.
The logo switches to the outdated-version variant when the updater finds pending files.

entries.title: Server browser toggle
changes: Added Server Browser to Render - Panorama cleanup options.
Server Browser now replaces the News panel by automatically applying the news/shop hide behavior while enabled.

entries.title: Panorama menu tab
changes: Added Render - Panorama menu tab for main menu cleanup options.
Connected the existing Panorama cleanup module to the new menu controls.

entries.title: Main menu server browser
changes: Added the Panorama main menu server browser as a Pasthetic runtime module.
Server browser now keeps its last A2S results in an embedded script cache and sorts visible servers by player count.

entries.title: Shared logo removal
changes: Removed shared logo runtime integration and assets from Pasthetic.
Updated the manifest after removing the voice-message based shared logo experiment.

entries.title: Predicted at targets
changes: Added adaptive Predicted at targets for anti-aim base correction against broken LC and shift release movement.
Moved prediction logic into a standalone antiaim_predicted_at_targets module with a single menu checkbox.

entries.title: World cleanup tools
changes: Added Remove ragdolls in Render - World using direct ragdoll entity hiding instead of physics cvars.
Added a standalone Panorama draft module for later main menu cleanup work.

entries.title: Clantag animations
changes: Added a single unique Pasthetic clantag that mixes Monolith framing with Cipher-style character glitches.
Clantag animation now uses synced game tick time so multiple players with the tag enabled stay on the same frame.

entries.title: Dormant aimbot validation
changes: Hardened dormant origin validation against near-zero and out-of-map coordinates.
Dormant ESP positions now require a valid box, sane alpha, proximity to the last real position, and one stable confirmation tick before shooting.

entries.title: Broken LC whitelist damage gate
changes: Auto whitelist broken LC now checks the active Rage minimum damage before preserving targets.
Minimum damage override is respected when its hotkey is active.

entries.title: Updater diagnostics
changes: Fixed update manifest parsing in GameSense by using json.parse.
Switched update URLs to uncached refs/heads/main raw GitHub paths.
Added clearer updater error messages with response previews.

entries.title: Manual updater
changes: Added manual Check updates and Download update buttons.
Added manifest-based file comparison by size and checksum.
Removed automatic module download from script startup.

entries.title: Pasthetic modularization
changes: Moved Pasthetic runtime code into lua/pasthetic modules.
Added module diagnostics logging for startup health checks.
Kept aes.lua as the main GameSense entrypoint.
